docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, L SERVED SEP-16-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOWSER, CURTIS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, L AS TO DEFENDANT BOWSER, CURTIS
